name: policy_enforcement_v1
description: Comprehensive policy enforcement dataset covering all 23 canonical adapterOS policies. Includes policy descriptions, violation detection, policy interaction scenarios, enforcement mechanism details, and policy evolution patterns. 2500 expert-grade examples across 5 categories with technically precise targets grounded in the actual crate implementations.

entries.notes: 2500 policy enforcement examples across 5 categories: description (500), violation detection (500), policy interaction (500), enforcement mechanisms (500), policy evolution (500)

provenance.review_notes: Security-tier dataset for training policy enforcement understanding across all 23 canonical policies. Sources: actual Rust implementation code in adapteros-policy crate.

intent: Train the model to understand, identify, and reason about adapterOS policy enforcement including violation detection, policy interactions, enforcement mechanisms, and policy lifecycle management.
